question.label: Support needed
question.name: What kind of support would make the next couple of weeks easier for you?
question.description: Opens up practical support needs without presuming the problem is personal or performance-related.

answer: The design-system PR — I got a ton of rework feedback and I'm not sure if I did something wrong or if that's just how reviews go here.

assessment.note: They named the design-system PR and uncertainty about whether the rework feedback reflects their mistake or local review norms, which strongly increases clarity; the answer was more confused than disengaged, so engagement stays flat.

new_queue.label: Review friction
new_queue.name: I wanted to ask about the design-system PR — what made that one hard to land?

new_queue.label: Review turnaround
new_queue.name: What has been slowing your PR reviews down lately?

new_queue.label: Feedback texture
new_queue.name: How has the feedback on your recent work landed for you?

new_queue.label: Ownership shift
new_queue.name: What parts of the frontend work still feel worth leaning into for you?

new_queue.label: Stretch gap
new_queue.name: Where do you feel like you're not getting enough stretch right now?

new_queue.label: Next step focus
new_queue.name: What do you want to get back to feeling steady on first?

history.answer_excerpt: Honestly kind of drained. I haven't been sleeping well and I'm behind on things.
A bit disconnected. I don't really know the team outside of tickets, and I missed the last two socials.
